title: Introduction to Subtraction

sentences.text: Today, we will learn about subtraction, starting with the minus sign.
The minus sign shows us we are taking away a number.
Imagine you have three apples, and you give one away.
How many apples do you have left? That's subtraction in action!
Let's practice! Start with five blocks and remove two blocks.
Count how many blocks remain after your subtraction.
Great job learning subtraction today! Remember the minus sign.
Keep practicing by subtracting with different objects at home.

teacherNotes: Encourage students to visualize subtraction with real objects for better understanding.
